task_completion.description: Lead 1 Opportunity Title is updated to 'Q3 Software License'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban, List, or Form view, the title for the first lead is exactly 'Q3 Software License' (without 'Alice Wong' or hyphens).

task_completion.description: Lead 1 Contact Name is updated to 'Alice Wong'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Form view or List view for the first lead, the 'Contact Name' or 'Customer' field is set to 'Alice Wong'.

task_completion.description: Lead 2 Opportunity Title is updated to 'Fleet Audit'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban, List, or Form view, the title for the second lead is exactly 'Fleet Audit' (without 'David Miller' or hyphens).

task_completion.description: Lead 2 Contact Name is updated to 'David Miller'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Form view or List view for the second lead, the 'Contact Name' or 'Customer' field is set to 'David Miller'.

task_completion.description: Lead 3 Opportunity Title is updated to 'Security Breach Response'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban, List, or Form view, the title for the third lead is exactly 'Security Breach Response' (without 'URGENT:', 'Elena Sisko', or hyphens).

task_completion.description: Lead 3 Contact Name is updated to 'Elena Sisko'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Form view or List view for the third lead, the 'Contact Name' or 'Customer' field is set to 'Elena Sisko'.

task_completion.description: Lead 3 Priority is set to Very High (3 stars)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRM Kanban, List, or Form view for the third lead (Elena Sisko), the priority indicator shows 3 filled stars.

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM graphical user interface to modify the leads.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Odoo CRM web interface, editing form fields, and saving records.

integrity.description: The modifications were made to the actual CRM records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes appear in the standard Odoo CRM views (Kanban, List, or Form) and are not just typed into a text editor, search bar, or separate document.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by using terminal commands to edit the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent using psql, sqlite3, or python scripts in the terminal to execute SQL UPDATE commands on the leads.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Lead 1 (REF_LEAD_001) requires Title: 'Q3 Software License', Contact Name: 'Alice Wong'. Lead 2 (REF_LEAD_002) requires Title: 'Fleet Audit', Contact Name: 'David Miller'. Lead 3 (REF_LEAD_003) requires Title: 'Security Breach Response', Contact Name: 'Elena Sisko', Priority: 3 stars (Very High). All changes must be made to the existing leads in the 'New' stage.
